expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Add a notification center with persistent read state, unread indicators, filtering, and read cleanup.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Persist notification read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification read state stored durably so read and unread status survives across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Stored notifications include a read-state field that persists across user sessions.",
        "Existing notifications default to unread unless a read state is already recorded.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/add-notification-read-state.*",
        "src/notifications/notification-model.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add shared notification read-state types and queries",
      "description": "As a developer, I want shared notification read-state definitions and retrieval helpers so unread calculations stay consistent.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Shared notification read-state type supports unread and read values.",
        "Notification queries can return unread counts and notification lists with read-state values.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/notifications/read-state.*",
        "src/notifications/query-notifications.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Persist read and unread state updates",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification read-state changes saved so notifications stay in the state I chose.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Application can update an individual notification between unread and read.",
        "Updated read state is returned correctly in subsequent notification queries.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/notifications/update-notification-read-state.*",
        "src/notifications/repository.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Show unread badge for notification center",
      "description": "As a user, I want an unread badge for notifications so I can notice pending updates quickly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Visible notification badge shows unread count when unread notifications exist.",
        "Badge count matches unread notification query results after page refresh.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/notifications/components/unread-badge.*",
        "src/layout/header.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Open notification center list",
      "description": "As a user, I want to open a notification list so I can review recent notifications in one place.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification center opens a visible list of notifications with each item read state shown.",
        "Opening the list renders persisted notifications in a consistent order.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/notifications/components/notification-center.*",
        "src/notifications/components/notification-list.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add read and unread controls in notification list",
      "description": "As a user, I want controls to mark individual notifications read or unread so I can manage what still needs attention.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Each notification item offers controls to mark it read or unread based on its current state.",
        "Using a control updates the rendered item state and unread badge count after save.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/notifications/components/notification-item.*",
        "src/notifications/components/read-state-toggle.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-007",
      "title": "Filter notifications by read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so I can focus on unread or previously handled items.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification center offers All, Unread, and Read filter options.",
        "Selecting a filter updates the visible list to notifications that match the chosen state.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/notifications/components/read-state-filter.*",
        "src/notifications/components/notification-list.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 7,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-008",
      "title": "Clear all read notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear notifications already marked read so my notification list stays focused on active items.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification center exposes a clear action for notifications currently marked read.",
        "Running clear removes read notifications from the visible list while leaving unread notifications intact.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/notifications/components/clear-read-button.*",
        "src/notifications/components/notification-center.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 8,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
